pageDescription: Calculate your healthy weight range based on height, age, and gender with our comprehensive healthy weight calculator

bmiFormula.label: BMI Formula
bmiFormula.metric: BMI = weight in kg / (height in meters)²

bmi.title: BMI Method
bmi.description: Uses BMI ranges (18.5-24.9) to determine healthy weight

who.title: WHO Guidelines
who.description: Based on World Health Organization recommendations for healthy weight ranges

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides estimates only and is not a diagnostic tool
criticalWarningsList.individualVariation: Healthy weight varies based on muscle mass, bone density, and body composition

importantNotesList: These calculations provide general guidelines only
Athletes may have higher weight due to muscle mass
Consult healthcare professionals for personalized advice
Weight should be considered alongside other health metrics

healthyRangeDetails.title: 18.5 – 25 kg/m²
healthyRangeDetails.description: is considered the healthy BMI range for adults.
healthyRangeDetails.association: This range is associated with the lowest risk of health problems and mortality.

messages.enterMeasurements: Enter your measurements to calculate your healthy weight range
messages.currentWeightStatus: Your current weight is {status} the healthy range
messages.ageWarning: For children and adolescents (≤20 years), use pediatric growth charts

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides estimates based on mathematical formulas and should not be used as a substitute for professional medical advice. Individual results may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Consult a Healthcare Professional
seekHelp.content: If you have concerns about your weight or health, please consult with a healthcare professional who can provide personalized advice based on your complete medical history and individual circumstances.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm

tooltips.age: Age can affect healthy weight calculations for children/adolescents
tooltips.gender: Different formulas may be used for men and women

enter_your_height_to_calculate_your_heal: Enter your height to calculate your healthy weight range
this_calculator_is_intended_for_adults_1:
This calculator is intended for adults 18 years and older. BMI calculations may not be
                              appropriate for children, pregnant women, or athletes.
enter_your_height_to_see_your_healthy_we: Enter your height to see your healthy weight range.
this_calculator_uses_the_standard_bmi_ra: This calculator uses the standard BMI range (
